Class TwoDimArraySignChanger

java.lang.Object
com.prutzkow.twodimarray.TwoDimArray
ru.rsreu.afonin0417.TwoDimArraySignChanger
public class TwoDimArraySignChanger extends com.prutzkow.twodimarray.TwoDimArray
Extension of TwoDimArray that provides functionality to find and change the sign of a specific element in each row. The element to change is the one (excluding the first and last) that has the minimal absolute difference between the sum of elements on its left and the sum of elements on its right. Also supports filling the array with random values.

  • Field Details

    • MINIMAL_ELEMENTS_COUNT

      private static final int MINIMAL_ELEMENTS_COUNT
      Minimal number of elements required in a row to perform the sign change operation. Rows with fewer elements than this count are skipped because the operation excludes the first and last elements, requiring at least three elements in a row.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • TwoDimArraySignChanger

      public TwoDimArraySignChanger(int... sizes) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Constructs a TwoDimArraySignChanger with the specified dimensions.
      Parameters:
      sizes - variable number of arguments defining the size of each dimension
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the provided sizes are invalid

  • Method Details

    • changeSignElementsWithMinimalSideSumDifference

      public void changeSignElementsWithMinimalSideSumDifference()
      Iterates through each row of the two-dimensional array. For each row, finds the element (excluding the first and last) with the minimal absolute difference between the left sum and right sum, and changes its sign. Rows with less than 3 elements are skipped.

    • fillRandomValuesFromInterval

      public void fillRandomValuesFromInterval(int lowerBound, int upperBound)
      Fills all elements of the two-dimensional array with random integers from the interval from lowerBound to upperBound inclusive.
      Parameters:
      lowerBound - the lowest bound of the interval
      upperBound - the upper bound of the interval

    • changeSignElementWithMinimalSideSumDifferenceInRow

      private void changeSignElementWithMinimalSideSumDifferenceInRow(int[] row)
      Finds the element with minimal absolute difference between left sum and right sum in the given row and changes its sign. Rows with length less than 3 are ignored.
      Parameters:
      row - the array representing a single row to change

    • findIndexWithMinimalSideSumDifference

      private int findIndexWithMinimalSideSumDifference(int[] row)
      Finds the index of the element (excluding the first and last) that has the minimal absolute difference between the sum of elements on its left and the sum of elements on its right.
      Parameters:
      row - the integer array row to analyze
      Returns:
      the index of the element with the minimum left-right sum difference

    • calculateAbsoluteDifferenceForIndex

      private int calculateAbsoluteDifferenceForIndex(int[] row, int index)
      Calculates the absolute difference between the sum of elements to the left of the given index and the sum of elements to the right.
      Parameters:
      row - the integer array
      index - the index of the element to calculate the difference for
      Returns:
      the absolute difference between left sum and right sum

    • calculateLeftSum

      private int calculateLeftSum(int[] row, int index)
      Calculates the sum of elements to the left of the specified index.
      Parameters:
      row - the integer array
      index - the index up to which elements are summed (exclusive)
      Returns:
      the sum of elements to the left of the index

    • calculateRightSum

      private int calculateRightSum(int[] row, int index)
      Calculates the sum of elements to the right of the specified index.
      Parameters:
      row - the integer array
      index - the index from which elements are summed (exclusive)
      Returns:
      the sum of elements to the right of the index

    • fillRowWithRandomValues

      private void fillRowWithRandomValues(int[] row, int lowerBound, int upperBound)
      Fills a single row with random integers from the specified interval.
      Parameters:
      row - the array row to fill
      lowerBound - the lower bound of the interval
      upperBound - the upper bound of the interval

    • generateRandomInteger

      private static int generateRandomInteger(int lowerBound, int upperBound)
      Generates a random integer within the specified interval from lowerBound to upperBound inclusive.
      Parameters:
      lowerBound - the lower bound of the interval
      upperBound - the upper bound of the interval
      Returns:
      a random integer in the specified range

    • calculateFirstAndLastElementSum

      private int calculateFirstAndLastElementSum()
      Calculates the sum of the first and last elements of the entire two-dimensional array.
      Returns:
      the sum of the first and last elements, or 0 if the array is empty

    • appendFormattedRow

      private void appendFormattedRow(StringBuilder builder, int[] row)
      Appends a formatted row of integers to the provided StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      builder - the StringBuilder to append to
      row - the integer array row to format and append

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the two-dimensional array. The string contains the sum of the first and last elements of the array and all rows with formatted output of elements.
      Overrides:
      toString in class com.prutzkow.twodimarray.TwoDimArray
      Returns:
      a string representation of the two-dimensional array
